title: Automation Blueprint Mini
deliverable: One workflow map, tool checklist, risk notes, and next-step plan.
allowed_input: Public or buyer-authorized workflow description, current tools, desired output, and one bottleneck.
acceptance_gate: Buyer receives a concise blueprint with current state, target flow, recommended tools, risks, and next action list.
money_rule: Count $0 unless external payment is posted, released, payable, or cleared after accepted scope and delivery.

title: PDF/Table Extraction Mini
deliverable: Up to 25 pages or 10 tables converted to cleaned CSV plus extraction notes.
allowed_input: Buyer-authorized PDFs only. No medical, legal, financial, credential, or confidential files in public threads.
acceptance_gate: Buyer receives cleaned CSV, source/page notes, and caveat list for any ambiguous fields.
money_rule: Count $0 unless external payment is posted, released, payable, or cleared after accepted scope and delivery.

title: Local SEO Snapshot Mini
deliverable: One public business/profile snapshot with top issues, missed fields, and next actions.
allowed_input: Business name, public website, public profile URL if available, city/service area, and target service.
acceptance_gate: Buyer receives public-only local SEO/GBP snapshot with prioritized checklist and no account access claims.
money_rule: Count $0 unless external payment is posted, released, payable, or cleared after accepted scope and delivery.

title: Website Quick-Win Audit Mini
deliverable: One public URL reviewed for copy, mobile, accessibility quick wins, friction, and next actions.
allowed_input: One public URL, target audience, desired conversion, and any buyer-authorized context.
acceptance_gate: Buyer receives findings with visible evidence, priority, impact, and concrete next action list.
money_rule: Count $0 unless external payment is posted, released, payable, or cleared after accepted scope and delivery.
